title: coilonox unifoliatum
side_effects: Coilonox unifoliatum can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and dizziness due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can also lead to kidney damage and respiratory issues. In severe cases, improper use of Coilonox unifoliatum can cause hallucinations, seizures, and even coma. Additionally, individuals with pre-existing medical conditions, such as heart disease or liver problems, may experience exacerbated symptoms when exposed to the plant's toxic compounds.
